title: Block Day 3: Tempo + Sprints
description: Final block day — aerobic work with neuromuscular maintenance
purpose: Final block day — aerobic work with neuromuscular maintenance

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 80% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/10. 80-80% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/10. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/10. 10:00 at 80%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/10. Power: 80-80%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/10. 9:00 at 80%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 80% FTP, Seated. 9:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 24% through. This is your workout. Own it. 80% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/10. 80% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/10. 80% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/10. 0:10 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 200% FTP, Standing. 10s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 200% for 10s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/10. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/10. 200% FTP, 95-120 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/10. 9:00 at 80%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 35% complete. Rep 4/10. 80% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 80%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/10. 80% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 46% done. 5 intervals left. 43 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 200%, 95-120 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5/10. 38 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 5 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/10. Power: 170-200%, Cadence: 95-120 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 46% done. 4 intervals left. 34 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 9:00 at 80%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 80% for 9:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6/10. 38 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 4 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 9:00 at 80%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 200%, 95-120 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 95-120 rpm, 170-200% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 7/10. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 3 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 10s. Then 34min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 57% into session. 200%, 95-120 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 8/10. 47 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 80-80% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 47 minutes of work done. 25 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 58% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 8. 2 to go. 25 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 9/10. 69% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 9 of 10. Target: 200% FTP, 95-120 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This is your workout. Own it. 200% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 9/10. 200% FTP × 10s. Standing. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. 15:00 at 65%. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 65% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 15:00 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 65%, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 71 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 61min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
